author: Ammer Ayach
name: Non-record: Pre-TTT Anchor Port (SDPA)
blurb: Clean 2026-03-21-style pre-TTT anchor ported to root skeleton with SDPA backend. 11L 512d 3x MLP, SmearGate, BigramHash, XSA-4, partial RoPE 16/64 with NTK scaling, LN scale, EMA 0.997, mixed int6+zstd, stride-64 sliding eval. 8xH100 SXM5 on Pegasus HPC via NGC 26.03 container.
